title: ContractMeta
description: Metadata for a single registered contract (spec 021, US1).

version.description: Semantic version of the contract shape.

schemaPath.description: Absolute path to the JSON Schema file backing this contract.

direction.description: Matches the direction field in the schema's operation block.

replaySafe.description: Default false. True only when the contract explicitly opts in. Write contracts must not set true without an allow-list entry (CI lint enforced).

sensitiveFields.description: Optional JSON Pointer paths whose values are redacted before storage.

tsHash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON serialization of the TypeScript-side schema declaration. Present when known at startup.

rustHash.description: SHA-256 of canonical JSON serialization of the Rust-side schema declaration. Present when known at startup.

mismatch.description: True when tsHash and rustHash are both present and differ.
